summary: All five REQ-11 acceptance criteria appear to be implemented in the diff. Hero headline uses enlarged font classes (text-6xl/md:text-8xl/lg:text-9xl), navigation uses offset-corrected smooth scrolling with NAV_HEIGHT=64, Contact section includes '+91 XXXXX XXXXX' phone placeholder, Portfolio grid items have min-h-[300px] for visual balance, and footer copyright reads '© 2025 Sulekha Sahoo'.
